# anico | Senior Designer

> Alberto Nicolás (anico) — Senior Designer with 28+ years of experience specialising in game UI/UX, brand art direction, and immersive digital product design. Based in Spain. Available for freelance projects.

## About

Alberto Nicolás, known professionally as anico, is a Barcelona-based Senior Designer with over 28 years of experience in interactive design. He specialises in video game UI/UX, brand art direction, and immersive technology design including Web3 and VR.

He has worked extensively with Gameloft Barcelona on flagship mobile titles such as Asphalt 9: Legends (200M+ downloads worldwide) and Asphalt Xtreme. His work spans from game interface design and interactive prototyping to full brand identity systems for companies operating in the Web3, AI, and Metaverse space.

He collaborates as a freelancer with agencies, studios, and direct clients across brand identity, web, and emerging platforms.

## Disciplines

- Game UI/UX Design
- Brand Art Direction
- Interactive Design
- Digital Product Design
- UX Prototyping (Figma, Protopie)
- Web3 & VR Design
- Illustration

## Selected Projects

- **GM World!** (2024) — Brand identity and corporate design for Metacampus's annual global forum focused on Web3, Artificial Intelligence, and the Metaverse. Category: Branding.
- **Asphalt Unite** (2024) — Full UI/UX redesign for the Asphalt franchise's new console entry, with esports-inspired visual language. Category: Game UI/UX.
- **Metacampus** (2024) — Corporate identity and website for an educational hub specialising in Web3, AI, and the Metaverse. Category: Branding & Web.
- **Disney Karting** (2023) — Self-initiated UI/UX and art direction proposal for a Disney karting game, maintaining franchise aesthetics while introducing a more mature tone. Category: Game UI/UX.
- **Netflix App** (2022) — Fully interactive Protopie prototype redesigning the Netflix app experience with new interactions and a reimagined main menu. Category: App Design & Prototyping.
- **Nike Shop** (2019) — Protopie prototype reimagining Nike's e-commerce with video-first product presentation and experimental interaction patterns. Category: App Design & Prototyping.
- **Hawkers** (2021) — Self-initiated e-commerce concept redesigning the shopping experience for Hawkers eyewear to match the brand's digital-native personality. Category: App Design & Prototyping.
- **Asphalt 9: Legends** (2018) — UI/UX design for Gameloft Barcelona's flagship mobile racing game, downloaded over 200 million times worldwide. Category: Game UI/UX.
- **Asphalt Xtreme** (2016) — UI/UX design, logo creation, custom typography, and marketing assets for Gameloft Barcelona's off-road racing entry. Category: Game UI/UX.
